S.FORM: e..pqutay misu lozi ki qutux zyaw ki mama ki, soni wal pqzyu' mha.
S.PHON: e..pqutaj misu lozi ki qutux zjaw ki mama ki, soni wal pqzjuʔ mħa.
S.FORM: e..pqutay misu lozi ki qutux zyaw ki mama ki, soni wal pqzyu' mha.
S.PHON: e..pqutaj mis~ɕu lozi ki qutux zjaw ki mama ki, s~ɕoni wal pqzjuʔ mħa.

S.FORM: zyaw na Sayun qani ga. aw. wal su ktan wal nha klayan ega su ega uzi rwa
S.PHON: zjaw na sajun qani ɣa. aw. wal su ktan wal nħa klajan eɣa su eɣa uzi rwa
S.FORM: zyaw na Sayun qani ga. aw. wal su ktan wal nha klayan ega su ega uzi rwa
S.PHON: zjaw na s~ɕajun qani ɣa. aw. wal s~ɕu ktan wal nħa klajan eɣa s~ɕu eɣa uzi rwa

S.FORM: wal nha klayun ega pkita kwara tayal qu gipun rwa
S.PHON: wal nħa klajun eɣa pkita kwara tajal qu ɣipun rwa
S.FORM: wal nha klayun ega pkita kwara tayal qu gipun rwa
S.PHON: wal nħa klajun eɣa pkita kwara tajal qu ɣipun rwa

S.FORM: ru nanu qu knita' hiya wah. balay balay pi?yaw qani.
S.PHON: ru nanu qu knitaʔ ħija waħ. β~valaj β~valaj pi?jaw qani.
S.FORM: ru nanu qu knita' hiya wah. balay balay pi?yaw qani.
S.PHON: ru nanu qu knitaʔ ħija waħ. βalaj βalaj pi?jaw qani.

S.FORM: qani ga iyat maku cinbalay. a, iyat nyuw ku muci yaw qani ga.
S.PHON: qani ɣa ijat maku ʦinβ~valaj. a, ijat njuw ku muʦi jaw qani ɣa.
S.FORM: qani ga iyat maku cinbalay. a, iyat nyuw ku muci yaw qani ga.
S.PHON: qani ɣa ijat maku ʦ~ʨinβalaj. a, ijat njuw ku muʦ~ʨi jaw qani ɣa.

S.FORM: yaw qani ga Sayun qani ga, muci nanu mnglung kwara itan tayal ga?
S.PHON: jaw qani ɣa sajun qani ɣa, muʦi nanu mŋluŋ kwara itan tajal ɣa?
S.FORM: yaw qani ga Sayun qani ga, muci nanu mnglung kwara itan tayal ga?
S.PHON: jaw qani ɣa s~ɕajun qani ɣa, muʦ~ʨi nanu mŋluŋ kwara itan tajal ɣa?

S.FORM: yan yaw qani ga balay balay ga? ini ga.. knalay nha ga.
S.PHON: jan jaw qani ɣa β~valaj β~valaj ɣa? ini ɣa.. knalaj nħa ɣa.
S.FORM: yan yaw qani ga balay balay ga? ini ga.. knalay nha ga.
S.PHON: jan jaw qani ɣa βalaj βalaj ɣa? ini ɣa.. knalaj nħa ɣa.

S.FORM: balay balay. balay balay ga. usa mciriq sinsiy qasa, nanu sensey qani ga
S.PHON: β~valaj β~valaj. β~valaj β~valaj ɣa. usa mʦiriq sinsij qasa, nanu sensej qani ɣa
S.FORM: balay balay. balay balay ga. usa mciriq sinsiy qasa, nanu sensey qani ga
S.PHON: βalaj βalaj. βalaj βalaj ɣa. us~ɕa mʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕins~ɕij qas~ɕa, nanu s~ɕens~ɕej qani ɣa

S.FORM: ana sensey qani ga, son m..kahul Gipun ga sensey son mha Buta sya qa
S.PHON: ana sensej qani ɣa, son m..kaħul ɣipun ɣa sensej son mħa β~vuta sja qa
S.FORM: ana sensey qani ga, son m..kahul Gipun ga sensey son mha Buta sya qa
S.PHON: ana s~ɕens~ɕej qani ɣa, s~ɕon m..kaħul ɣipun ɣa s~ɕens~ɕej s~ɕon mħa βuta s~ɕja qa

S.FORM: ru cbaq kya ru kya nineng, sannen lga ne
S.PHON: ru ʦβ~vaq kja ru kja nineŋ, sannen lɣa ne
S.FORM: ru cbaq kya ru kya nineng, sannen lga ne
S.PHON: ru ʦ~ʨβaq kja ru kja nineŋ, s~ɕannen lɣa ne

S.FORM: ga, baha ini nineng, sannen ga, sensey ga kazoku tnaq kya rrwa
S.PHON: ɣa, β~vaħa ini nineŋ, sannen ɣa, sensej ɣa kazoku tnaq kja rrwa
S.FORM: ga, baha ini nineng, sannen ga, sensey ga kazoku tnaq kya rrwa
S.PHON: ɣa, βaħa ini nineŋ, s~ɕannen ɣa, s~ɕens~ɕej ɣa kazoku tnaq kja rrwa

S.FORM: sozya kya la. han. kya wal mrawi kya la.
S.PHON: sozja kja la. ħan. kja wal mrawi kja la.
S.FORM: sozya kya la. han. kya wal mrawi kya la.
S.PHON: s~ɕozja kja la. ħan. kja wal mrawi kja la.

S.FORM: mha nanu ga baha ta baqun trang cyuw msqun lungan nha lpi. i. han.
S.PHON: mħa nanu ɣa β~vaħa ta β~vaqun traŋ ʦjuw msqun luŋan nħa lpi. i. ħan.
S.FORM: mha nanu ga baha ta baqun trang cyuw msqun lungan nha lpi. i. han.
S.PHON: mħa nanu ɣa βaħa ta βaqun traŋ ʦ~ʨjuw ms~ɕqun luŋan nħa lpi. i. ħan.

S.FORM: ana son ana mhngan..ga sinsiy qasa ga musa muyaw yaba nya
S.PHON: ana son ana mħŋan..ɣa sinsij qasa ɣa musa mujaw jaβ~va nja
S.FORM: ana son ana mhngan..ga sinsiy qasa ga musa muyaw yaba nya
S.PHON: ana s~ɕon ana mħŋan..ɣa s~ɕins~ɕij qas~ɕa ɣa mus~ɕa mujaw jaβa nja

S.FORM: musa mita Sayun ru maki balay 禮貌 ru Gipun qasa
S.PHON: musa mita sajun ru maki β~valaj ** ru ɣipun qasa
S.FORM: musa mita Sayun ru maki balay 禮貌 ru Gipun qasa
S.PHON: mus~ɕa mita s~ɕajun ru maki βalaj ** ru ɣipun qas~ɕa

S.FORM: Sayun qani ga btunux ru cukusiy balay. btunux balay ay
S.PHON: sajun qani ɣa β~vtunux ru ʦukusij β~valaj. β~vtunux β~valaj aj
S.FORM: Sayun qani ga btunux ru cukusiy balay. btunux balay ay
S.PHON: s~ɕajun qani ɣa βtunux ru ʦ~ʨukus~ɕij βalaj. βtunux βalaj aj

S.FORM: qasa ga, swa' makubaqun iyat maku knita' son mha i pinkyasan nya hiya
S.PHON: qasa ɣa, swaʔ makuβ~vaqun ijat maku knitaʔ son mħa i pinkjasan nja ħija
S.FORM: qasa ga, swa' makubaqun iyat maku knita' son mha i pinkyasan nya hiya
S.PHON: qas~ɕa ɣa, s~ɕwaʔ makuβaqun ijat maku knitaʔ s~ɕon mħa i pinkjas~ɕan nja ħija

S.FORM: genba' hiya, mra ega lga. honto no Sayun no hengan nya ru
S.PHON: ɣenβ~vaʔ ħija, mra eɣa lɣa. ħonto no sajun no ħeŋan nja ru
S.FORM: genba' hiya, mra ega lga. honto no Sayun no hengan nya ru
S.PHON: ɣenβaʔ ħija, mra eɣa lɣa. ħonto no s~ɕajun no ħeŋan nja ru

S.FORM: mhoyaw qsya wal mqluy
S.PHON: mħojaw qsja wal mqluj
S.FORM: mhoyaw qsya wal mqluy
S.PHON: mħojaw qs~ɕja wal mqluj
